shared_content.title: AI Opportunity Briefing
shared_content.subtitle: Compare narrative directions before committing the full deck.

variants.label: Conservative report cover
variants.strategy: Executive, restrained, and suitable as a safe default.

variants.label: Portfolio-style visual opener
variants.strategy: More personal and visual, useful when the deck needs a case-study feel.

variants.label: Analytical summary
variants.strategy: Decision-first framing for review meetings that need tradeoffs and implications.

text_slots.left_card_body: AI adoption pressure is rising, but readiness varies by team.
text_slots.right_card_body: Prioritize workflows where quality and cycle time can be measured.

variants.label: Sales narrative opener
variants.strategy: Buyer-facing and more assertive, suitable for pitch or partner contexts.
